profile.name: RIVAN MEINAKI
profile.title: AI ENGINEER
profile.about: An innovative AI Engineer and Software Developer specializing in building end-to-end predictive pipelines, real-time computer vision deployment, and intelligent LLM systems incorporating RAG architectures. Adept at bridging advanced machine learning models with scalable backend architectures, containerized environments, and comprehensive system observability infrastructure.

contact.contactHeading: Let's build the next arc together!
contact.contactSubtext: Open to AI engineering roles, collabs, and interesting problems.

projects.title: Decision Support System
projects.desc: An automated incident analysis and decision support system built with Python, OpenRouter API for multi-tier LLM reasoning, and ChromaDB for RAG-powered historical case retrieval. Containerized with Docker and managed via Traefik, the platform delivers context-aware operational recommendations and automated incident documentation.

projects.title: n8n RAG Chatbot
projects.desc: An advanced RAG chatbot repository featuring a decoupled architecture built with n8n workflows and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), integrated with a search engine for real-time data retrieval and dynamic tool execution.

projects.title: Stock Analytics Dashboard
projects.desc: A full-stack stock analytics pipeline and dashboard engineered to track, analyze, and visualize market data. The platform features automated data processing pipelines backed by Supabase and a responsive frontend built using React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. At its core, the system incorporates robust predictive and analytical models.

projects.title: People Counting System
projects.desc: This project is an automated room occupancy and people-counting system engineered to run efficiently on edge devices like the Raspberry Pi 4, utilizing standard USB webcams. It combines computer vision, object tracking, local persistence, and a modern web dashboard to monitor indoor room traffic in real time.

projects.title: Interview Analyzer
projects.desc: The Interview Analyzer System is a multimodal candidate evaluation platform built on a dual runtime architecture (Bun/ElysiaJS backend and Python FastAPI AI microservices). It processes candidate interviews using DeepFace for facial expressions, OpenAI Whisper for transcription and filler-word detection, and Praat for voice quality analysis, feeding these signals into an MBTI and soft-skills estimation engine.

projects.title: Container Prediction System
projects.desc: An exploratory research notebook evaluating a two-stage machine learning pipeline (XGBoost) to predict container transit durations. The workflow incorporates strict cycle extraction, temporal splitting, rolling historical lags, and hyperparameter tuning. Due to poor data quality limiting model accuracy, the project functions primarily as a technical feasibility study.

projects.title: SAFE Care System
projects.desc: The SAFE Care System is an enterprise-grade healthcare and facility management backend platform. Built on top of a modular architecture, it provides robust RESTful APIs, role-based access control (RBAC), secure authentication pipelines, and integrated AI-powered computer vision capabilities (utilizing YOLOv8) for automated monitoring and compliance workflows within clinical or care facility environments.

experience.desc:
• Designed, optimized, and deployed practical AI solutions that enhance operational decision-making, automate monitoring, and streamline business workflows.  
• Owned the full development lifecycle of software and AI delivery, building responsive user interfaces and robust Python backends for business tools like the AI Decision Support System (DSS), PoLokk, and Interview Analyst applications.  
• Constructed end-to-end data pipelines for machine learning model training, containerized the Cargo Prediction project, and handled the configuration and physical installation of hardware prototyping modules (like Raspberry Pi motherboards and external LCD screens).

• Deployed and managed comprehensive monitoring stacks (Metrics, Logs, Synthetics, and Uptime) for PostgreSQL, MySQL, MSSQL, Redis, and internal endpoints.  
• Refactored and enhanced internal engineering applications (Microtools) using Python (Streamlit) for better maintainability.  
• Integrated Static Application Security Testing (SAST) using Semgrep to build dashboards displaying security scan data clearly for users.  
• Managed infrastructure troubleshooting, handled Linux environments, and coordinated Docker-based local simulations for development.

• Developed machine learning programs focused on automated food detection and calorie estimation.  
• Built and refined image classification methods to recognize various food types.  
• Integrated third-party AI interfaces like the OpenAI API to generate precise calorie estimations and enhance user engagement.
